comment: This file is a starting point. The picocli-codegen annotation processor
comment2: auto-generates most of the necessary entries at compile time and merges
comment3: them into this directory. Add entries here ONLY for classes that are
comment4: accessed via reflection but not picked up automatically (e.g. Jackson
comment5: deserialization targets, SPI implementations loaded by ServiceLoader).
comment6: To discover missing entries: run the native binary with the tracing agent:
